title: I Am Not an AI – The Tlbic Policy Proposal
abstract: I Am Not an AI – The Tlbic Policy Proposal may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms...
abstract_zh: 嘿，别被名字唬住，“我不是AI——Tlbic政策提案”可是专治各种AI焦虑症的神器！在五花八门的AI工具中，它就像是一把锐利的小刀，精准地切中要害。别看它小众，用起来比那些臃肿的大平台强多了，就像是在 AI 丛林里找到了一片避风港。
